Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Posters of movies that are currently[n]showing are lined up on the wall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}They show a different movie each day.[n]Maybe I'll come watch one sometime...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like there's a film festival[n]happening now. Maybe I should[n]invite someone from the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
